creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 179852
patch (svn diff) for sysutils/fusefs-afuse

this pr(1) updates sysutils/fusefs-afuse :

MASTERSITES - replace GOOGLE
adds PORTREVISION
MAINTAINER - replaces ports@ with me
WWW change to reflect it's new location

NOTE this project moved from GOOGLECODE to GITHUB.
But the source on GITHUB, while the same version,
can not be built w/o doing an additional AUTOTOOLS
dance. As nothing is lost by using the original
version on GOOGLECODE; I'm just going to host it
until the GITHUB branch actually changes to a newer
version.

That said, I changed the WWW to reflect the GITHUB
site. Since the SF site is just a redirect to GITHUB, anyway.

That's about it!

Please find the svn diff sysutils_fusefs-afuse.diff,
and the build log sysutils_fusefs-afuse-QA-LOG, attached.

Thanks!

--Chris
